# `/scriptevent` Command
Triggers a script event with an ID and message.

<table>
  <tr>
    <th>Permission Level</th>
    <td>Game Directors</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Requires Cheats?</th>
    <td>Yes</td>
  </tr>
</table>

## Usage
### `/scriptevent <messageId: string> <message: message>`

## Arguments
- `message`: message
- `messageId`: string
